whatChangedTitle: What changed since your last review?

emptyStates.declining: Recent reviews show regression. Focus on the recommended action below.

recommendedAction.runFirstReviewDescription: Start tracking production readiness and receive a clear next action.

recommendedAction.maintainReadinessDescription: Your application is ready to ship. Schedule periodic reviews to catch regressions early.
recommendedAction.fixPriorityDescription: Resolving this item provides the largest impact on your Production Ready Score.
recommendedAction.improveFocusDescription: Concentrate on the focus area below for the fastest path to production.
recommendedAction.customDescription: The latest review identified a clear next step for your application.
